since_last: 51% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.69%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -2.38% · Gold +0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 51% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.69%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.69%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +5.56%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.13% at $138.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
